blockers.description: Upstream skill-creator run_eval is unusable: select() on a pipe crashes on native Windows (WinError 10038/10093) AND its slash-command probe mis-detects triggers on EVERY OS -> ~0 recall. WSL fixes only the crash, not the detection.
blockers.workaround: Use the VENDORED native-fixed harness at .claude/skills/lz-tpp-workspace/tools/skill-creator-eval/ (run `python -m scripts.run_eval` from there). NEVER the installed upstream, NEVER WSL.

blockers.description: grade-run.mjs is a deterministic PRE-FILTER only; it fail-closes to grading.preliminary.json while judge items remain. Final grading.json REQUIRES the LLM-judge merge step (task 8), which is not yet built.
blockers.workaround: Build task 8 before aggregating EVAL-02 / taking Pass@k.

human_actions_pending.action: None required for the native path -- the native-Windows `claude` is already authenticated. Re-verify A3 (lz-tpp NOT enabled as a project skill in ~/.claude) at EVAL-01 run time so the real skill cannot steal the trigger.

decisions.decision: D-09 native pivot: run EVAL-01 natively via a vendored, bug-fixed run_eval; abandon WSL; artifacts under .claude/skills/lz-tpp-workspace/ (NOT plugins/, NOT .planning/)
decisions.rationale: WSL fixes only the select() crash; the trigger-detection bugs are OS-independent (#3548/#3041/#2678)

decisions.decision: Grader = deterministic pre-filter (transformation-name presence + nodrive) + LLM-judge for all nuance; fail-closed output
decisions.rationale: regex cannot reliably judge 'does NOT do X'/insight/deviation without inverting the signal (D-04)

decisions.decision: metrics.json per run = canonical nested {tool_calls:{Edit,Write,Bash,...}} (flat {edits,writes,testRuns} also accepted); any mutating/exec tool >0 = drove; wrong shape fails LOUD
decisions.rationale: fresh review caught a silent false-pass when the grader read a flat shape but the harness/schema produce nested

decisions.decision: At most ONE human-gated D-07 tuning pass; non-blocking; Phases 1-4 stay complete regardless
